ar_promo_desc: Place any piece in your space with AI-powered AR
legal_info_hint: By using the Evim Furniture app, you agree to these terms and our privacy policy.
pp_intro_desc: Evim Furniture ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect information when you use our mobile application.
pp_collect_desc:
We collect the following types of information:

• Account information: name, email address, phone number, profile picture
• Device information: device model, operating system, unique device identifiers
• Usage data: pages viewed, furniture items browsed, search queries, favorites
• Camera data: photos taken for AR furniture placement (processed locally or via our AI service)
• Location data: only when you explicitly grant permission for delivery or store locator features
pp_use_desc:
We use your information to:

• Provide and improve our furniture catalog and AR features
• Personalize your experience and show relevant recommendations
• Process your favorites and browsing history
• Send notifications about new collections and updates (with your consent)
• Analyze app usage to improve performance and user experience
• Provide customer support
pp_sharing_desc:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:

• Service providers who help operate our app (hosting, analytics, AI processing)
• Firebase (Google) for authentication and push notifications
• Law enforcement when required by law

All third-party providers are bound by data protection agreements.
pp_retention_desc: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting our support team. Browsing history and AR photos are stored locally on your device and can be cleared through app settings.
pp_rights_desc:
You have the right to:

• Access your personal data
• Correct inaccurate information
• Delete your account and data
• Withdraw consent for notifications
• Export your data
• Restrict processing of your data

To exercise these rights, contact us at support@evimfurniture.uz
pp_security_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS/SSL), secure authentication via Firebase, and regular security audits. AR photos processed through our AI service are encrypted and automatically deleted after processing.
pp_cookies_desc: Our mobile app uses local storage and Firebase Analytics to understand app usage patterns. We do not use browser cookies. You can disable analytics tracking in your device settings. We use anonymous, aggregated data to improve our furniture recommendations.
pp_changes_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the app or via email. The date of the last update will be displayed at the top of this page. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance.
pp_contact_desc:
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact us:

Email: support@evimfurniture.uz
Phone: +998 55 777 00 07
Telegram: @evim_uzb

Evim Furniture LLC
Tashkent, Uzbekistan
st_use_desc: Evim Furniture provides a digital catalog of furniture products with AR visualization capabilities. By downloading and using this app, you agree to these Terms of Service. The app is intended for personal, non-commercial use. You must be at least 16 years old to create an account.
st_account_desc: To access certain features (favorites, ratings, AR), you may need to create an account using your phone number, email, or social login (Google/Apple). You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate information and update it as needed.
st_catalog_desc: Our catalog displays furniture items with photos, materials, dimensions, and pricing information provided by manufacturers and sellers. While we strive for accuracy, actual products may vary slightly in color, texture, or dimensions from what is shown in the app. Product availability and pricing are subject to change without notice.
st_ar_desc: The AR (Augmented Reality) feature allows you to visualize furniture in your space using your device camera. Photos submitted for AI processing are used solely for generating furniture placement visualizations. We do not store or share your room photos beyond the processing session. AR visualizations are approximations and should not be used as exact measurements for purchasing decisions.
st_content_desc: By submitting ratings, reviews, or photos through the app, you grant Evim Furniture a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use this content for app improvement and marketing purposes. You retain ownership of your content. You agree not to submit content that is offensive, misleading, or violates third-party rights.
st_ip_desc: All content in the Evim Furniture app — including but not limited to furniture images, 3D models, logos, design elements, and software code — is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or commercially use any content from the app without written permission from Evim Furniture.
st_liability_desc:
Evim Furniture is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for:

• Inaccuracies in product information or AR visualizations
• Service interruptions or technical issues
• Decisions made based on information in the app
• Third-party content or links

Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for premium features, if any.
st_modify_desc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting in the app. We will notify you of significant changes through push notifications or in-app messages. Your continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
st_governing_desc: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Any disputes arising from the use of this app shall be resolved through the courts of Tashkent, Uzbekistan. We encourage resolving disputes through our customer support before pursuing legal action.
st_contact_desc:
For questions about these Terms of Service:

Email: support@evimfurniture.uz
Phone: +998 55 777 00 07
Telegram: @evim_uzb

Evim Furniture LLC
Tashkent, Uzbekistan
helpQ1Title: How to browse furniture in the app?
helpQ1Desc: The home page shows categories, popular furniture and combinations. Tap any item to see detailed information.
helpQ2Title: How to use the AR feature?
helpQ2Desc: On the furniture page, tap "Try in your room". Point your camera at the room, and the furniture will be placed virtually.
helpQ3Desc: Each furniture page shows available materials. You can select the color and material type that suits your style.
helpQ4Title: How does the favorites list work?
helpQ4Desc: Tap the heart icon on any furniture you like. All saved items appear in the "Favorites" section.
helpQ5Desc: Go to the Profile section and tap "Language". You can choose Uzbek, Russian or English.
helpQ6Desc: You can reach us through the social media links above or call our phone number.
